_description: Checks for tasks in PROCESSING state that have exceeded their HITL timeout. Sends Telegram escalation alerts.
name: OpenClaw: HITL Timeout Monitor

nodes.name: Schedule (Every 30 min)
nodes.notes: Runs every 30 minutes to check for HITL timeouts.

nodes.name: Get Processing Threads
nodes.notes: Get all tasks in PROCESSING state that haven't been alerted yet.

nodes.name: Check Timeouts
nodes.notes: Checks each processing thread against its task type's timeout threshold.

parameters.text:
={{ '⏰ HITL TIMEOUT

Task: ' + $json.taskType + '
Subject: ' + ($json.subject || '').substring(0, 80) + '
Waiting: ' + $json.elapsedMin + ' min (limit: ' + $json.timeoutMin + ' min)

⚡ Action needed: Review draft in Gmail.' }}
